This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Property background-color value 'contrast-color(pink)'
  assert_in_array: value "rgb(255, 192, 203)" not in array ["rgb(0, 0, 0)", "rgb(255, 255, 255)"]
[FAIL] Property background-color value 'contrast-color(color(srgb 1 0 1 / 0.5))'
  assert_in_array: value "color(srgb 1 0 1 / 0.5)" not in array ["rgb(0, 0, 0)", "rgb(255, 255, 255)"]
[FAIL] Property background-color value 'contrast-color(lab(0.2 0.5 0.2))'
  assert_in_array: value "lab(0.2 0.5 0.2)" not in array ["rgb(0, 0, 0)", "rgb(255, 255, 255)"]
[FAIL] Property background-color value 'contrast-color(color(srgb 10 10 10))'
  assert_in_array: value "color(srgb 10 10 10)" not in array ["rgb(0, 0, 0)", "rgb(255, 255, 255)"]
[FAIL] Property background-color value 'contrast-color(color(srgb -10 -10 -10))'
  assert_in_array: value "color(srgb -10 -10 -10)" not in array ["rgb(0, 0, 0)", "rgb(255, 255, 255)"]
[FAIL] Property background-color value 'contrast-color(contrast-color(pink))'
  assert_in_array: value "rgb(255, 192, 203)" not in array ["rgb(0, 0, 0)", "rgb(255, 255, 255)"]
[FAIL] Property background-color value 'contrast-color(currentcolor)'
  assert_in_array: value "rgb(255, 192, 203)" not in array ["rgb(0, 0, 0)", "rgb(255, 255, 255)"]
[FAIL] Property background-color value 'contrast-color(color(srgb calc(1 + (sign(20cqw - 10px) * 1)) calc(1 + (sign(20cqw - 10px) * 1)) calc(1 + (sign(20cqw - 10px) * 1))))'
  assert_in_array: value "color(srgb 0 0 0)" not in array ["rgb(0, 0, 0)", "rgb(255, 255, 255)"]
Harness: the test ran to completion.
